decisions.deferred_facade: operationUnavailable only after lifecycle admission and valid local input; zero side effects
decisions.lifecycle_composition: KitDependencies.SendRuntime + Kit.instance/Kit.fixture in Core/KitFactory.swift + LifecycleCommandBridge activation/invalidation, including failed-close active-generation revocation
decisions.authority_identity: fresh per-Kit QuoteAuthorityClientID is separate from wallet persistence namespace
decisions.quote_record: one canonical immutable QuoteAuthorityRecord binds authority, intent, preflight identity, policy, and every review field; store equality is required before consume
decisions.generation_error: SendQuote private authority record survives store cleanup; private client ID -> lifecycle generation -> monotonic deadline -> active/consumed lookup; missing own unexpired record is operationUnavailable
decisions.secure_random: exactly eight token-generation attempts before operationUnavailable
decisions.broadcast_codespace: private raw value projected to sdk/thorchain/other
decisions.reflection: CustomDebugStringConvertible + CustomReflectable fixed redacted mirror, exercised through Mirror, String(reflecting:), and dump
decisions.verification: local MacBook tests plus an implementation-head iOS 13 deployment-floor/import guard, explicit external-surface negatives, and concurrency/floor harnesses; CI build-only

trust_reason: Gimle mapping/session defects remain quarantined; every load-bearing selected claim is independently verified with current-tree rg/Git evidence.
